summary: Workflow: action refs unpinned (oven-sh/setup-bun@v2 not SHA-pinned), no write permissions needed but declared read-only (fine). Script: good use of set -euo pipefail, typed interfaces, async/await. Issues: run-tests.sh hardcodes '21 pass' (brittle), label output format uses brackets making grep fragile. Workflow duplicates 3 near-identical 'run label assigner' steps (lines ~21-37) that could be a matrix. globToRegex escaping incomplete (^,$,[,{,+,( unescaped). No error for negative priority despite validator claiming to check it (checks <0 but allows 0 fine). Overall functional but with fragile assertions and missed refactoring.
